name: Liza Treyger
bio: Liza Treyger is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and podcast host born in Odessa, Ukraine and raised in Chicago. Known for a sharp, candid delivery, she co-hosts the podcast That's Messed Up and released her debut hour-long special, Night Owl, on Netflix.

timeline.ev: Records the Comedy Central album Glittercheese
Launches the podcast That's Messed Up with Kara Klenk
Releases debut Netflix special Night Owl
